name: Bigg Boss Telugu
overview: The Telugu version of the reality show where a number of contestants (known as "housemates") live in a purpose-built house and are isolated from the rest of the world. Each week, housemates nominate two of their fellow housemates for eviction, and the housemates who receive the most nominations faces a public vote out.

trailers.title: Boredom ki cheppey goodbye, vachesindi #BiggBossTelugu Season 5! #BiggBossTelugu5 soon on #StarMaa
